_version_note: Seed = generated from skill file + transcript before Stephen completes voice discovery. Replaced by 'calibrated' version after discovery.
_confidence_note: Seed values are inferred, not chosen. Discovery overrides any of these on completion. Treat as a starting hypothesis, not a profile.

hook_type._note: Pro-Viz article opens with declaratives. Transcript has Stephen using rhetorical-question-then-answer structure occasionally. Default to statement, let discovery confirm.

entry_mode._note: Stephen has not posted personal stories on LinkedIn. Pro-Viz reads as professional observation. Personal mode may emerge in discovery.

specificity_of_opening._note: Three frames in an edit suite. A teenager learns to drive in twenty hours. San Vicente in Tribeca. Pattern is consistent.

tension_vs_clarity._note: Pro-Viz article leads with the point. Stephen on the call also leads with the answer then explains. May modulate to tension on AGI/AI commentary posts.

sentence_rhythm._note: Stephen explicit on April 17 call: 'I write longer sentences with commas. I like to breathe and think. I think like that.' Strong signal.

evidence_style._note: Pro-Viz article mixes anecdote with light data (the Super Bowl spot, the founder approval). Lean anecdote, allow blend on industry posts.

vulnerability_depth._note: No data. Stephen has not posted vulnerable content. Discovery is the only way to find this. Default to surface to avoid forcing.

expertise_display._note: Stephen does not credentialize on the call. Lets the work speak. 'I never wanted to be an email guy' shows experience through admission, not title.

complexity_handling._note: JEPA reference, ARC-AGI test, Pro-Viz technical depth. Stephen trusts the reader. Does not oversimplify.

closing_style._note: Pro-Viz article lands on 'It needs more certainty.' Calendar drafts land on observations. Closer to takeaway than open-ended.

call_to_engagement._note: Anti-rule from skill file. Hard preference. Exception is the AICP community post.

last_line_energy._note: 'See you there.' 'It needs more certainty.' 'That conversation is the film.' All reflective, not forward-driving.

humor._note: Stephen swears in person and is dryly self-deprecating ('I never wanted to be an email guy'). On LinkedIn this should translate to dry observation, not punchlines.

audience_relationship._note: Stephen is a working co-founder talking to other working creatives. Never mentor or guide. Skill file anti-rule confirms.

register._note: Pro-Viz article is more polished than the transcript. Default to conversational, allow polished on BOFU posts.

tofu._note: TOFU posts (texture, dinner photos, set photos) earn permission for slightly more personal entry. Still surface-level until discovery confirms otherwise.

mofu._note: MOFU posts (Pro-Viz thesis, JEPA, three frames) can blend anecdote with light technical reference.

bofu._note: BOFU is community/AICP. Soft invitations OK (drop their name below). Stay specific (named people, named venues).

_neither_note: Empty in seed. Populated when Stephen rejects both options on a discovery round.
draft_prompt_natural_language: Open with a statement, not a question. Use a question-then-answer structure occasionally if the topic warrants it.
Lead with a specific scene, number, or named place. Three frames. Twenty hours. San Vicente.
Lead with the point first, then explain. Reserve tension-first openings for AGI or AI commentary.
Write longer flowing sentences with commas. Avoid short punchy fragments.
Build credibility through anecdote and observation, not data dumps. Allow light data on industry posts.
Keep vulnerability surface-level until calibrated otherwise. No forced personal stories.
Show expertise through what Stephen noticed, not by stating credentials.
Trust the reader to handle complexity. Do not oversimplify technical references like JEPA or ARC-AGI.
End on a takeaway that lands. Reflective, not forward-driving.
No explicit engagement asks. Exception is the AICP community post.
Last line should carry weight, not push to action.
Dry, understated humor. Self-aware, not self-deprecating-as-performance.
Peer-to-peer. Never mentor, never teacher, never guide.
Conversational register. Slightly more polished on community-facing or AICP posts.
hard_rules: No three or more short declarative sentences in a row.
No CTAs except the AICP community post.
Under 250 words for original posts. Under 80 words for comments. Under 30 words for texture-post captions.
